macroThesis: Asymmetric optionality on aviation electrification: $36M revenue growing 136% YoY, $0.7B market cap. Beta is building the charging infrastructure and power network for electric aircraft before the planes exist at scale — similar positioning to early EV charging networks. The differentiated angle is infrastructure-first rather than aircraft-first. If electric aviation timelines compress, the network effect on charging infrastructure could be substantial. Speculative tier alongside OKLO — not a core position, but a legitimate asymmetric bet with a differentiated thesis.
